phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me dice dónde nació Goya?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs MEH DEE-theh DÓN-deh nah-thee-Ó GOH-yah

responses.english: He was not born here, it was in Fuendetodos.
responses.phonetic: EHN foo-ehn-deh-TOH-dohs AH KM AHL SOOR
responses.french: En Fuendetodos, a 44 km al sur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find early Goya frescoes
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están los primeros frescos de Goya?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs PREE-meh-ros FREHS-kohs deh GOH-yah?

responses.english: Ground floor, room two, at the back.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah SAH-lah DOHS AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: Planta baja, sala dos, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get between Goya sites
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo me muevo entre los sitios de Goya?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh meh MWEH-voh EHN-treh lohs SEE-tee-ohs deh GOY-yah?

responses.english: Tourist bus. Stop in front of the entrance.
responses.phonetic: KOH-hah EHL BOOS ROH-hoh FREHN-teh AHL moo-SEH-oh GOH-yah
responses.french: Coja el bus rojo frente al Museo Goya.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main Goya frescoes are in Zaragoza
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde están los frescos principales de Goya en Zaragoza?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAN lohs FREHS-kohs preen-see-PAH-lehs deh GOH-yah ehn thah-rah-GOH-thah

responses.english: In the Basilica del Pilar, on the main cupolas.
responses.phonetic: ehn lah bah-SEE-lee-kah dehl pee-LAR, ehn lahs KOO-poo-lahs preen-see-PAH-lehs.
responses.french: En la Basílica del Pilar, en las cúpulas principales.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a combined Goya ticket for all sites
phrases.text_local: ¿Existe un bono conjunto para todos los sitios de Goya?
phrases.pronunciation: eks-EES-teh oon BOH-noh kon-HOON-toh PAH-rah TOH-dohs lohs SEE-tyohs deh GOH-yah

responses.english: Yes, ask the Zaragoza tourist office.
responses.phonetic: see, preh-GOON-teh-leh ah lah oh-fee-SEE-nah deh too-REES-moh deh thah-rah-GOH-thah.
responses.french: Sí, pregúntele a la oficina de turismo de Zaragoza.
